productDisplayName: Skechers Women Ultra Silver Sports Shoes
description: Stylish and uber cool, these Shape-up Ultra shoes from the toners colletion of skechers add an extra bounce to your step. With a great mesh-synthetic leather combination in attractive colors, these shoes are designed to activate your calf, thigh and buttock muscles. Look super stylish in these comfortable shoes all day long. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for durability and style Synthetic overlays for reinforcement and added style Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Sofly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Mesh tongue for improved ventilation Brand tab on tongue and brand logo embedded on the side Midsole Removable insole that can be replaced with a medical orthotic Lightweight phylon midsole for comfort and support Outsole Kinetic toning pods on the forefoot and the heel help create bi-axial natural instability with every step and therefore activates underused muscles to maintain balance T.P.U.-V.I.S. elements on each side of KTP help control motion and focus instability on each pod Durale high abrasion rubber outsole protects the KTP and provides traction control at bi-axial natural instability contact points arrow shaped ridges on the outsole for improved traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
